# Basic Markdown Features

A short paragraph with **bold**, *italic*, and ***bold-italic*** text.
Also ~~strikethrough~~ and `inline code`.

## Headings

### H3 Section

#### H4 Sub-Section

##### H5 Deep

###### H6 Deepest

## Unordered Lists

- Alpha
- Beta
  - Nested Beta-1
  - Nested Beta-2
- Gamma

## Ordered Lists

1. First
2. Second
3. Third

## Task Lists

- [x] Done
- [ ] Pending
- [x] Also done

## Blockquote

> "The only way to do great work is to love what you do."
>
> — Steve Jobs

## Code Block

```rust
fn greet(name: &str) -> String {
    format!("Hello, {}!", name)
}
```
